title: To The Clock
content:
Here's to the Clock!
    Whose hands, we pray heaven,
    When we come home at three,
    Have stopped at eleven!
meaning:
This evocative piece by Oliver Herford, titled "To The Clock", represents a masterful exploration of classic. The lines capture a profound emotional resonance...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
